data.name: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete your account?

data.name: This action will permanently erase your profile and API keys from our servers.
data.value: This action will permanently erase your profile and API keys from our servers.

data.name: Your existing shortened links will NOT be deleted. They will become 'headless' links and will continue to redirect users successfully. However, you will lose the ability to manage or track them. Only site administrators will be able to manage them.
data.value: Your existing shortened links will NOT be deleted. They will become 'headless' links and will continue to redirect users successfully. However, you will lose the ability to manage or track them. Only site administrators will be able to manage them.
